data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distribution of incoming network traffic across multiple servers to ensure reliability and responsiveness.
data.technical_spec: Uses global and regional load balancers with failover capabilities.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Application design pattern involving loosely coupled services for flexibility and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using Kubernetes for container orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes Edge Network to distribute content proximally to users.
data.technical_spec: Built over Google's own global infrastructure.

data.title: Data Caching
data.description: Caches frequently accessed data to improve response time and reduce server load.
data.technical_spec: Employs multi-layered caching strategies with Redis and in-memory data stores.

data.title: Server-Side Rendering
data.description: Renders web pages on the server and sends fully-built pages to the client.
data.technical_spec: Used to enhance page load performance and SEO.
